memory_text: Session 8 (1:51 pm on 15 July, 2023): Caroline said "Last Friday I went to a council meeting for adoption. It was inspiring and emotional - so many people wanted to create loving homes for children in need. It made me even more determined to adopt."

Melanie has kids and mentioned in late May 2023 that her kids are excited about summer break and they're thinking about going camping next month (June). She also mentioned in June that she took her family camping in the mountains, and in July they went camping at the beach and in the forest.
